hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(test("\\.(vue|ts|js)$"))' | xargs -I{} pnpm --dir "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" exec prettier --write {}
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(test("\\.(vue|ts|js)$"))' | xargs -I{} pnpm --dir "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" exec eslint --fix --quiet {}

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(vue|ts|js)$ ]]; then
  output=$(pnpm --dir "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" type-check 2>&1)
  exit_code=$?
  if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    echo "$output" | head -30 >&2
  fi
  exit 0
fi
